de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions
  • Enclosing class:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder

    public static class SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.SymbolicExecutionCompletions
extends Object
    Instances of this class are returned by SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.analyse() to inform about newly completed blocks and returned methods.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      private List<IExecutionNode<?>> blockCompletions
